news.title: Trump warns Iran’s ‘whole civilization will die tonight’ unless deal struck
news.summary: The near closure of the Strait of Hormuz since the war began has led to a historic oil supply shock. It quickly sent global energy prices soaring.

news.title: House Democrats call on federal regulator to crack down on offshore prediction market war bets
news.summary: Prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket have exploded in popularity recently. The platforms have raised questions about how to properly regulate the platforms.

news.title: Used car prices rise to highest point since summer 2023
news.summary: Used car prices rise to highest point since summer 2023, according to new figures. Used car prices hit highest level since summer of 2023. Prices are up more than 10 per cent since the start of the year.

news.title: Universal Music stock rises after Pershing Square's $64 billion takeover proposal
news.summary: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square said Universal Music's stock price has "languished" due to a range of issues that can be addressed with the merger.

news.title: Novo Nordisk's explosive Wegovy pill launch draws a new wave of patients into GLP-1 weight loss treatment
news.summary: CNBC spoke with five U.S. patients who recently started the pill following its launch. They have varying initial experiences with the drug.

news.title: Trump moves to scrap utility bill aid for Americans, as soaring energy costs hit over $1,000 on average this winter
news.summary: The White House is moving to scrap a program that helps low-income people pay their utility bills. The move comes at a time when Americans’ energy costs are surging.

news.title: Here’s an overlooked reason the housing market could soon get even worse
news.summary: Seaport analyst has turned bearish on multiple home-builder stocks. Analyst says outlook for job growth could be worse for the housing market over the long term.

news.title: The price Americans pay for medicine has gotten horribly out of control. Here’s how to fix it.
news.summary: We can start with laws that limit the power of pharmacy-benefit managers. We can start by changing the law to make it easier for pharmacies to manage their benefits.

news.title: Businesses are spending for the future despite uncertain times — a good omen for the economy
news.summary: Business investment rose in March for the seventh time in eight months and hit an all-time high. Companies poured more money into the technologies of the future.

news.title: How to move past your biggest money mistakes
news.summary: .com will feature iReporter photos in a weekly Travel Snapshots gallery. Visit CNN.com/Travel each week for a new gallery of snapshots.
